title: Worker Task
description: Per-worker task definition written by main session BEFORE dispatching the subagent.

agent.description: Subagent type to dispatch (e.g. planner, code-reviewer).

objective.description: Single-paragraph statement of what this worker must accomplish.

context.description: Bullet-point context lines (file paths, prior decisions, constraints).

deliverables.description: Concrete outputs expected (e.g. 'Updated docs/auth.md', 'Passing pytest -k auth').

dependsOn.description: Worker slugs that must reach completed state before this one starts.

lightweight.description: Lightweight worker: skips formal task spec; only handoff + status are required.

completionRules.description: Constraints the worker must honor before declaring completed.
default: 不再向下派遣 subagent，结果写进最终响应
主会话负责把响应写进 handoff.json
